title: Edit Link Text in Email
excerpt: Hi Monday team, please allow the text a link displays to be edited so we don’t have to paste the entire link in an email.

posts.author: sofia1 (Sofia)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Monday team, please allow the text a link displays to be edited so we don’t have to paste the entire link in an email.
